home.hero_subtitle: Aesthetic and reconstructive surgery with refined technique, natural results, and the trust your most important decision deserves.
home.doctor_title: Surgical precision at the service of your beauty
home.doctor_p1: I am Dr. Francisco López Torres, a board-certified plastic surgeon in Mexico City. My practice is exclusively dedicated to aesthetic and reconstructive surgery, combining meticulous technique, refined aesthetic judgment, and the highest standard of medical safety.
home.doctor_p2: Every patient receives a personalized evaluation, a unique surgical plan, and human-centered follow-up before, during, and after the procedure. My commitment is to deliver natural, harmonious, and lasting results.
home.cat1_p: As an aesthetic surgeon in Mexico City, I offer facial and body procedures aimed at enhancing each patient's natural harmony. My approach combines modern techniques, personalized planning, and close postoperative follow-up.
home.cat2_title: Plastic and Reconstructive Surgery Clinic in Mexico City
home.cat2_p: My practice includes larger reconstructive and body-contouring procedures, performed under strict surgical protocols in certified hospitals where patient safety is the absolute priority.
home.ba_p: Every transformation reflects meticulous work, planned in detail and executed with the technique each patient deserves. Drag to discover.
home.hospital_p: I perform my procedures at high-specialty hospital facilities in Mexico City, with operating rooms equipped with state-of-the-art technology and highly trained medical staff.
home.zones_title: We attend patients throughout Mexico City and metropolitan area
home.cta_p: Make the decision with the right information. Let's talk about your goals, resolve your doubts, and design the right surgical plan for you together.
